creator: grembo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Vieno,

Thank you for opening this request.

I'm actively maintaining both of these ports - I actually just finished porting paperless-ngx last week (which was quite some effort). I also updated deskutils/py-paperless to work with django4.2 recently, so I see no reason to remove it from the ports tree at this moment.

Is there anything in particular that troubles you about having a choice between the two for the time being?

I certainly will deprecate and ultimately remove deskutils/py-paperless at some point in the future, but there is no need to rush - even though paperless-ngx has many cool features, it also differs in usability and is also a bit more resource hungry, so, given that I just made paperless-ngx available a couple of days ago, I don't want to force existing users to migrate anytime soon - hence my efforts to keep the old version alive for at least the remainder of this year.

Ultimately, deskutils/py-paperless will go, until then I'll close this PR.

Best
Michael
